name: A Whip as Sharp as a Blade

system.description: An exotic weapon wielded by Trebizond, the princess Paladin from a distant country. This special whip is as deadly as any blade, capable of slicing through flesh and armor with equal ease. As part of her 'From a Far Country' Gift, Trebizond can make use of weapons and exotic objects seized from foreign lands to surprise opponents. Once per scene, she creates a special belonging like this razor-sharp whip. When using her special equipment, Trebizond increases her Opposition Level by 1, demonstrating her mastery of unconventional combat techniques.
